mapper.select: SELECT admin_id AS adminId, admin_pw AS adminPw, admin_name AS adminName, admin_role AS adminRole FROM admin WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}

SELECT seq, entry_type AS entryType, name, phone, address, shop_info AS shopInfo, car_model AS carModel, test_drive_time AS testDriveTime, mkt_agree AS mktAgree, safety_agree AS safetyAgree, qr_code_url AS qrCodeUrl, qr_scan_time AS qrScanTime, reg_date AS regDate FROM event_participant ORDER BY seq DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE event_participant SET qr_scan_time = NOW() WHERE seq = #{seq}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(reg_date) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todayCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN qr_scan_time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS qrCheckCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN qr_scan_time IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS driveWaitCnt FROM event_participant
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(reg_date, '%m.%d') AS regDateStr, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM event_participant WHERE reg_date >= DATE(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 DAY)) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(reg_date, '%m.%d')
